marketState: neutral, mixed signals with a cautious bullish tilt
summary: Front price ($2.868) sits almost exactly at the model's fair value ($2.923, FAIR status), so there is no obvious mispricing to exploit today. The 8-16 day weather outlook is a genuine bullish catalyst (demand +29.5% vs 5y, above the historical max range), and managed-money is net short at just the 8th percentile of its 5-year range while spot trades -15.8% YTD vs a -6.9% seasonal median, both contrarian-bullish. That is offset by a persistent storage surplus (+180 Bcf vs 5y, +22 Bcf bearish surprise) and daily/weekly technicals that remain outright bearish (RSI ~36, negative MACD, 50<200 death cross), even though intraday (1h/4h) MACD histograms just turned positive. Seasonality itself is not a strong tiebreaker here: only 38% odds of higher prices in 4 weeks, a typical -1.4% 4-week move, and 'Low' reliability (59pp spread). Net read: modest bullish structural/positioning tailwinds against oversupply and a still-intact bearish price trend, favoring patience over conviction.
